description: Shape of one column inside database_table.columns[]. Dialect-agnostic. fk is a soft reference — a non-existent target table produces warnings, never an error.

fields.description: Dialect-agnostic type (text, integer, json, boolean, timestamp, ...).
fields.name: type

fields.description: Whether the column accepts NULL. Defaults false.
fields.name: nullable

fields.description: Whether the column is part of the primary key.
fields.name: pk

fields.description: Soft foreign key { table, column }. Dangling target → warning only.
fields.name: fk

fields.description: Allowed values when the column is an enumeration.
fields.name: enumValues

name: ColumnSpec
